notes: IBM acquired Informix database assets for $1B in 2001; Informix products merged into IBM DB2 product line. Informix-IDS still sold as IBM Informix.
Illustra OODBMS/object-relational DBMS with DataBlade technology; acquired by Informix in 1995 to create Universal Server.
Oracle 7.3 assessed; Oracle eventually released Oracle8/8i with full object-relational features; now Oracle Database dominates enterprise RDBMS.
IBM DB2 Common Server assessed; DB2 absorbed Informix technology after 2001 acquisition; still active.
CA had dual strategy: CA-Ingres RDBMS + Jasmine OODBMS; Ingres later became independent as Actian.
Sybase System 11 assessed; Sybase acquired by SAP in 2010 for $5.8B; SAP ASE/IQ products continue.
Microsoft assessed as lagging in Universal Server; SQL Server evolved to become major RDBMS with extensive extensions.
Verity text search referenced as DataBlade partner; acquired by Autonomy in 2005.
MapInfo spatial DataBlade partner; acquired by Pitney Bowes in 2007.
